raw_consumer_statement: My dispute with Barclays ( XXXX XXXX ) was denied incorrectly. The bank categorized the issue as services rendered, but the actual issue is that the service was materially not as described. The tickets had a structural obstruction that blocked the primary visual component of the event, which was not disclosed in the listing. The bank failed to properly evaluate the misrepresentation and instead relied solely on whether the service was used.
